title: .senpai/event_logs.jsonl (one object per line)
description: Documents the shape scripts/event-log.js's appendEvent() writes, as called from hooks/scripts/handler.js's safeAppendEvent(). Distinct from state.schema.json: this is an append-only audit trail, not the live approval state.

hook_event_name.description: e.g. PreToolUse, UserPromptSubmit, SessionStart, PostToolUse, Stop, SessionEnd.

tool_name.description: Present for tool-call events (PreToolUse/PostToolUse), e.g. Write, Edit, Bash.

file_path.description: tool_input.file_path when present. Redacted to '[REDACTED]' by redactIfSecretPath() if it resolves to a secret path.

command.description: tool_input.command for Bash calls. Redacted to '[REDACTED: command referenced a secret path]' if any token in the command resolves to a secret path.

content.description: tool_input.content for Write calls. Redacted to '[REDACTED]' alongside file_path/command redaction.

logged_at.description: ISO timestamp added by appendEvent() unless the caller already supplied one.
